summary: iter177 testing complete - Job Profiles + Employee HR + AI Evaluation features fully working. Backend: 35/35 tests passed. Frontend: All 4 tabs (Employees, Job Profiles, Hours, Coverage) render correctly. HR/AI drawer with resume upload/download/delete, profile assignment, and Claude Sonnet 4.5 evaluation all functional.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_qa_engineer, TEST_update_me, TEST_deactivate_me job profiles during testing. Luna B. has cook_2 profile assigned and resume uploaded.
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter177 adds Job Profiles (21 seeded positions) + Employee HR features (resume upload/download/delete, profile assignment, Claude AI evaluation). All endpoints admin-gated with X-Admin-Token header. Frontend People Admin panel has 4 tabs: Employees (with HR·AI drawer), Job Profiles (with BulletEditor for responsibilities/skills), Hours of Operation, Leadership Coverage. AI evaluation uses Claude Sonnet 4.5 via Emergent LLM Key and returns structured JSON with fit_score, strengths, gaps, interview_questions, evaluation_rubric, recommended_development.

features_tested.job_profiles_list: PASS - GET /api/job-profiles/list returns 21+ seeded profiles with correct fields
features_tested.job_profiles_upsert: PASS - POST /api/job-profiles/upsert creates/updates profiles, validates level enum, normalizes code
features_tested.job_profiles_by_code: PASS - GET /api/job-profiles/by-code/{code} returns full profile, 404 for unknown
features_tested.resume_upload_txt: PASS - POST /api/employees/{id}/resume accepts .txt with sha256 fingerprint
features_tested.resume_upload_rejects_unsupported: PASS - Returns 400 for unsupported MIME types
features_tested.resume_meta: PASS - GET /api/employees/{id}/resume returns metadata WITHOUT bytes
features_tested.resume_download: PASS - GET /api/employees/{id}/resume/download streams file with Content-Disposition
features_tested.resume_delete: PASS - DELETE /api/employees/{id}/resume removes resume and unsets employee fields
features_tested.assign_profile_invalid_404: PASS - Returns 404 for invalid profile code
features_tested.evaluate_claude_response: PASS - Returns structured JSON with fit_score (0-100), fit_label, summary, strengths, gaps, interview_questions (6-10), evaluation_rubric, recommended_development
features_tested.frontend_people_admin_panel: PASS - Panel loads with 4 tabs after admin auth
features_tested.frontend_employees_tab: PASS - Shows employee cards with job profile pill, resume pill, birthday, hire date
features_tested.frontend_job_profiles_tab: PASS - Shows 23 profile cards with level-colored borders, department/level pills, skills count
features_tested.frontend_hr_drawer: PASS - Opens with job profile dropdown, resume section, AI evaluation button
features_tested.frontend_ai_evaluation: PASS - Runs Claude evaluation and displays result with score, history
